ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Advanced From Feb-13-19 To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelli Herzog for and with Lesley Cannan (Petitioner).

Ms. Herzog stated that she filed a supplement. The Clerk noted that the supplemental account and report was filed on December 19th. The Waiver of Account and Report, etc. is under submission subject to receiving a copy of the supplement and a proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Chan. Not reported.

Ex Parte Application For An Order Shortening Time For The Hearing On Executors Waiver Of Account And Report Of Personal Representative And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelli Herzog for and with Lelsey Cannan.

Ms. Cannan stated that she is the named Executor and the sole heir. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for July 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
